reason: Successfully sent a message to agent QA-20260509-010646-jr4o and verified it responded with the correct answer "4" to the math question.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home with three agents in sidebar
Located and clicked on "QA-20260509-010646-jr4o" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened
Verified agent status — Agent status displayed as "idle" (visible in top right corner)
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully typed into input field and sent button clicked
Waited for response — Agent responded within 1 second
Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly shows "4" as the answer to 2+2, screenshot taken confirming successful interaction
